label: Disable Developer Options
description: Turns off Developer Options which many banking apps detect

label: Disable USB Debugging
description: Turns off ADB/USB debugging

label: Disable Wireless Debugging
description: Turns off wireless ADB debugging

label: Disable Mock Locations
description: Disables mock location providers

label: Disable Accessibility Services
description: Turns off accessibility services that some apps detect

label: Disable Location
description: Turns off location services for privacy-sensitive apps

label: Disable Auto-Rotate
description: Locks screen rotation to portrait

label: Enable Auto-Rotate
description: Enables screen rotation for video or gaming apps, reverts to locked

label: Disable Adaptive Brightness
description: Turns off the light sensor so the screen won't dim when your finger covers it

label: Set Medium Brightness
description: Sets screen brightness to ~55% for comfortable indoor use

label: Set Low Brightness
description: Sets screen brightness low for nighttime or dark-room use, reverts to 50%

label: Force Landscape Rotation
description: Sets default rotation to landscape when auto-rotate is off

label: Increase Font Size
description: Increases system font size for readability in certain apps

label: Extend Screen Timeout
description: Sets screen timeout to 10 minutes to prevent dimming during idle moments

label: Short Screen Timeout
description: Sets screen timeout to 15 seconds for quick lock when using banking apps

label: Enable Stay Awake (Charging)
description: Keeps screen on while charging via USB or AC — useful for dashboards or navigation

label: Enable Do Not Disturb
description: Silences notifications to avoid interruptions

label: Disable Touch Sounds
description: Turns off touch feedback sounds

label: Disable Haptic Feedback
description: Turns off vibration on touch

label: Disable Notification Sounds
description: Mutes the notification alert sound

label: Max Media Volume
description: Sets media volume to maximum for video or music apps, reverts to ~50%

label: Mute Ring Volume
description: Silences the ringer to avoid calls interrupting your session

label: Mute Notification Volume
description: Silences notification sounds to avoid interruptions

label: Disable Animations
description: Turns off system animations for snappier performance

label: Disable Window Animations
description: Turns off window transition animations

label: Disable Transition Animations
description: Turns off activity transition animations

label: Disable Bluetooth
description: Turns off Bluetooth to save battery or avoid interference

label: Disable WiFi
description: Turns off WiFi to force mobile data or save battery

label: Enable Airplane Mode
description: Enables airplane mode for full offline isolation

label: Disable Mobile Data
description: Turns off mobile data to prevent background usage or force WiFi
